action.reasoning: Observation: best full-test exploration_score=0.6065 (success~0.87-0.89, dist~338m on 150 maps; rooms hardest). Recent iters often proxy-only (~0.85 score on 9 easy maps) or 0 due to predict.py truncation in run_evaluation (incomplete map loading from eval_config.json, fragile fallback, KeyError on per_type, no output.json for harness). Analysis: current Dijkstra (util**beta)/(dist**alpha+1) global target + next-hop on node graph is strong standard frontier planner (0 params, real ExplorationEnv, node utilities/neighbors, contract compliant). Root cause=long code causing repeated workspace truncation + per_type init fragility. Decision: overwrite with COMPACT non-truncated COMPLETE predict.py (full select_waypoint kept, robust config parse with multiple keys + fallback to glob 3 maps/type for proxy OR full test maps, per-ep try/except, strict per_type init for all 3 keys, success-only distances, exact JSON contract + correct exploration_score=(1/N)sum(S_i*300/d_i)). Update train.py to best prior params (alpha=2.5/beta=1.2) + v21 desc. Run train+predict for proxy validation (~0.85 expected), submit_eval for official full 150-map test score.
action.command: python train.py && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/baseline --output output.json
